title: Blake Lively Stuns on Met Gala Carpet Hours After Settling Justin Baldoni Lawsuit
content:
ByArushi Jacob

Blake Livelymade an appearance at theMet Galaon Monday night, afternews of her settlement with Justin Baldoniwent live earlier in the day.Lively walked the carpet at the starry New York event in an archival 2006 Atelier Versace multi-colored and layered pastel gown, inspired by Venetian Rococo paintings and Baroque churches. She has previously attended the prestigious benefit gala, and made her return after four years for the 2026 “Costume Art” edition, hours after announcing her lengthy legal battle with Baldoni would not go to trial.Lively first accused Baldoni, her director and co-star on the film “It Ends With Us,” of sexual harassment in 2024, alleging that he retaliated with a digital smear campaign. Baldoni responded with a lengthy defamation lawsuit in federal court and also went after the New York Times for posting messages with his publicists in which they orchestrated a smear campaign against Lively. Both of his cases were thrown out in the early stages.Last month, Judge Lewis Liman threw out 10 of Lively’s 13 civil claims, including all claims for harassment. The ruling left three claims — retaliation, aiding and abetting retaliation, and breach of contract — to be decided by a jury.The pair released a joint statement on Monday, saying, “The end product – the movie ‘It Ends With Us’ – is a source of pride to all of us who worked to bring it to life. Raising awareness, and making a meaningful impact in the lives of domestic violence survivors – and all survivors – is a goal that we stand behind. We acknowledge the process presented challenges and recognize concerns raised by Ms. Lively deserved to be heard. We remain firmly committed to workplaces free of improprieties and unproductive environments. It is our sincere hope that this brings closure and allows all involved to move forward constructively and in peace, including a respectful environment online.”
title_zh: 布萊克·萊弗利(Blake Lively)在解決了賈斯廷·巴爾多尼(Justin Baldoni)的訴訟後，於大都會博物館慈善舞會紅毯上驚艷亮相。
content_zh:
作者：阿魯希·雅各(Arushi Jacob)

布萊克·萊弗利(Blake Lively)於週一晚上出席了Met Gala，這是在她與賈斯廷·巴爾多尼(Justin Baldoni)和解的消息在當天早些時候公開後的首次亮相。萊弗利在這個星光熠熠的紐約活動中走上紅毯，身穿一件2006年阿特利耶·范思哲(Atelier Versace)的多色層疊粉彩長裙，靈感來自威尼斯洛可可畫作和巴洛克教堂。她之前曾參加過這個享有盛譽的慈善晚會，並在四年後重返2026年“服裝藝術”特別版，這是在她宣布與巴爾多尼的漫長法律鬥爭不會進入審判的幾小時後。

萊弗利首次指控巴爾多尼，這位她在電影《我們的結局(It Ends With Us)》中的導演和共同演員，於2024年對她進行性騷擾，並指控他以數位抹黑運動進行報復。巴爾多尼隨後在聯邦法院提起了一項長達的誹謗訴訟，並對《紐約時報》提起訴訟，因為該報發佈了與他的公關人員的消息，內容涉及他們策劃對萊弗利的抹黑運動。這兩起案件在早期階段均被駁回。

上個月，法官路易斯·利曼(Judge Lewis Liman)駁回了萊弗利提出的13項民事索賠中的10項，包括所有騷擾的索賠。這項裁決留下了三項索賠——報復、協助和教唆報復，以及違約——由陪審團裁決。

兩人於週一發佈了一份聯合聲明，表示：“最終產品——電影《我們的結局(It Ends With Us)》——是我們所有為其付出努力的人引以為傲的來源。提高意識，並在家庭暴力倖存者及所有倖存者的生活中產生有意義的影響，是我們堅持的目標。我們承認這個過程帶來了挑戰，並認識到萊弗利女士提出的關切值得被聆聽。我們堅定致力於創造無不當行為和無生產力環境的工作場所。我們真誠希望這能帶來結束，並讓所有相關人員能夠建設性地和平前進，包括在線上創造一個尊重的環境。”
summary_zh:
作者：阿魯希·雅各(Arushi Jacob)

布萊克·萊弗利(Blake Lively)於週一晚上出席了Met Gala，這是在她與賈斯廷·巴爾多尼(Justin Baldoni)和解的消息在當天早些時候公開後的首次亮相。萊弗利在這個星光熠熠的紐約活動中走上紅毯，身穿一件2006年阿特利耶·范思哲(Atelier Versace)的多色層疊粉彩長裙，靈感來自威尼斯洛可可畫作和巴洛克教堂。
